tweets.full_text:
Speed just did an internet stream from underwater. The tech is genuinely wild, because water blocks every wireless signal we have.

Your phone disconnects in 4 inches of water. WiFi and cellular both run in the gigahertz range, and seawater absorbs those frequencies as heat. Same
tweets.summary: Speed在水下进行互联网直播，突破无线信号在水中衰减的物理限制。前沿通信技术演示，展示水下网络传输创新。
angles: 水下直播技术突破：Speed实现深海网络传输

tweets.full_text:
Vitamin D is not a vitamin.

Calling it a vitamin is the medical equivalent of calling petrol a refreshment. Technically a liquid. Functionally something else entirely.

Vitamin D is a steroid hormone. Your skin manufactures it from cholesterol when sunlight hits it. It then

Every European drying rack is the answer to a math problem Americans never have to solve.

Spain residential power runs €0.29/kWh. Germany €0.38. Texas runs $0.13. A conventional dryer eats roughly 4 kWh per cycle, so a single load costs €1.16 in Madrid vs $0.52 in Houston.
